title: citrus × aurantium subf. banyu
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. banyu, also known as bitter orange, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antidepressant effects. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. banyu include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve anxiety and stress, and even help with weight loss. Citrus × aurantium subf. banyu can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or essential oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
